allow: Bash('C:/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh' pr create --title '现代化 UI 改造：课程管理 + 时段选择 + 时间选择器' --body ' *)

Stop.command:
if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then files=$(git status --porcelain | awk '{print $2}' | tr '
' ' '); ts=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M'); msg="auto: $(date '+%m-%d %H:%M') | $files"; entry="## $ts | $msg
$(printf '%s
' $files | sed 's/^/- /')
"; if [ -f logs/CHANGELOG.md ]; then (head -1 logs/CHANGELOG.md; printf '%b
' "$entry"; tail -n +2 logs/CHANGELOG.md) > logs/.cl_tmp && mv logs/.cl_tmp logs/CHANGELOG.md; fi; git add -A && git commit -m "$msg" && git push; fi
